[INFORMASI KONTEKS VISUAL GAMBAR]:
- Deskripsi Visual: A stylized anime-style illustration shows a close-up of a blonde girl with wide purple eyes and open mouth, surrounded by bold pink and black graphic text.

The main subject is a cartoon girl with light blonde hair in short bangs and two visible side locks framing her face, large purple eyes, and a small open mouth, facing forward in an intense, close-up view. Her head and shoulders fill most of the frame, with her expression rendered as surprised or excited by the open mouth and large eyes.

The setting is unclear because it appears to be a graphic poster or digital artwork background with layered text and shapes rather than a real environment. The lighting is flat and stylized, with high-contrast colors and clean outlines typical of anime artwork.

The background is mostly pale or light-toned with additional pink rectangular blocks and vertical graphic elements on both left and right sides. The composition centers the face while multiple text elements overlap in the lower-left and across the image.

Visible Text:
CINTANYA
TERTOLAK
BRO MEMILIH
JADI FE M BOY

No important visible text detected beyond the items listed above.

Practical Summary:
The image is a graphic anime-style portrait with bold overlaid text. It focuses on a blonde, purple-eyed character’s close-up face surrounded by colorful typographic blocks.
- Hasil Ekstraksi Teks Gambar (OCR):
# Extracted Text

CINTANYA  
TER TOLAK  
BRO MEMILIH  
JADI FE MBOY  

# Structured Version

- CINTANYA  
- TERTOLAK  
- BRO MEMILIH  
- JADI F E MBOY  

# Notes

- The line breaks/spaces in the text “JADI FE MBOY” are unclear due to stylization; it appears as two parts: “JADI FE” and “MBOY”.

Pertanyaan asli user: Analyze this image for NSFW (Not Safe For Work) / pornographic content / nudity. Reply strictly in JSON format with three fields: 'nsfw' (boolean: true if it contains nudity, porn, suggestive, or nsfw content, false if it is safe/sfw), 'confidence' (number: from 0 to 100 representing the likelihood of nsfw/nudity/suggestive content), and 'label' (string: 'porn', 'nsfw', 'suggestive', or 'safe' depending on the content). Do not include markdown formatting or backticks, just raw JSON.
